description: Giving or showing firm and constant support or allegiance. 'Nophei' names the quality of faithfulness—remaining true to relationships, commitments, and values through changing circumstances.
sound_symbolism: The word holds steady. 'No' grounds in presence, connection established. 'Phe' /ɸe/ breathes gentle constancy, commitment sustained. Finally 'i' arrives at certainty, loyalty confirmed.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'nophei melu' (loyal friend). Phi loyalty is not blind obedience—it honors relationships while maintaining ethical discernment. Related: theomi (trust), seru (commit).

pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Loyal communication maintains relationship through difficulty—staying present even when conversations become challenging.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Traditional communities depended on loyal bonds—relationships that endured through seasons of abundance and scarcity.
